artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log, bucketed in 10-minute intervals" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log, bucketed in 10-minute intervals" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 129 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time logs/app.log, bucketed in 10-minute intervals ERROR count per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log — 22 ERROR lines across a one-hour window, bucketed into 10-minute intervals" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Stack direction="vertical" gap="lg">
    <Grid columns="3" gap="md">
      <Metric label="Total ERROR lines" value="22" detail="out of 100 lines logged" />
      <Metric label="Peak bucket" value="11" detail="09:30–09:39" tone="danger" />
      <Metric label="Window" value="09:00–10:00" detail="six 10-minute buckets" />
    </Grid>
    <Chart kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" x="bucket" y="errors" height="360" data='[{"bucket":"09:00","errors":0},{"bucket":"09:10","errors":1},{"bucket":"09:20","errors":5},{"bucket":"09:30","errors":11},{"bucket":"09:40","errors":4},{"bucket":"09:50","errors":1}]' />
    <Text variant="muted">Errors cluster sharply in the 09:30 bucket, driven by repeated pricing upstream failures (econnrefused, etimedout) that trip the circuit breaker and cascade into 503s on /catalog before recovering by 09:50.</Text>
  </Stack>
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="logs/app.log — 22 ERROR lines across a one-hour window, bucketed into 10-minute intervals" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <Stack direction="vertical" gap="lg">
    <Grid columns="3" gap="md">
      <Metric label="Total ERROR lines" value="22" detail="out of 100 lines logged" />
      <Metric label="Peak bucket" value="11" detail="09:30–09:39" tone="danger" />
      <Metric label="Window" value="09:00–10:00" detail="six 10-minute buckets" />
    </Grid>
    <Chart kind="bar" title="ERROR count per 10-minute bucket" x="bucket" y="errors" height="360" data='[{"bucket":"09:00","errors":0},{"bucket":"09:10","errors":1},{"bucket":"09:20","errors":5},{"bucket":"09:30","errors":11},{"bucket":"09:40","errors":4},{"bucket":"09:50","errors":1}]' />
    <Text variant="muted">Errors cluster sharply in the 09:30 bucket, driven by repeated pricing upstream failures (econnrefused, etimedout) that trip the circuit breaker and cascade into 503s on /catalog before recovering by 09:50.</Text>
  </Stack>
</Card>
